explanation_methods: PatchCore top-patch drift and mask checks
failure_mode: Shortcut-sensitive models and anomaly detectors can move their attention under lighting, blur, compression, and acquisition shifts.
intervention: Track explanation movement alongside score and accuracy, and compare against a shortcut-reduced classifier.
key_lesson: A metric can stay flat or move only slightly while the explanation path drifts into a nuisance region.
model: Learned industrial classifier drift path, plus optional local PatchCore anomaly-drift diagnostics on MVTec AD bottle, MVTec AD 2, and VisA.
remaining_caveats: The classifier path uses a local NEU-CLS-derived shortcut split rather than a full industrial benchmark.
The anomaly sections depend on local MVTec AD / MVTec AD 2 preparation.
MVTec AD 2 support currently extends Demo 08, not the main PatchCore hero report.
task: Corruption and acquisition-style shifts showing that performance drift and explanation drift are different signals.
title: Demo 08 - Explanation Drift Under Shift
